name: Horseshoe Bay Beach
description: Bermuda's most famous beach — known worldwide for its iconic pink sand, shaped by crushed coral and shell. Horseshoe-shaped bay with calm turquoise water, seasonal lifeguards, beach bar, and rental facilities. Busiest in summer; arrive early or off-season for a quieter experience. Accessible by Bus Route 7 from Hamilton.
hours: Open year-round; beach bar and lifeguard service seasonal (May–October)
